name: GitHub Code Review Agent
description: Poll your repositories every 5 minutes and automatically post a code review on each new or updated pull request. Reviews cover correctness, security, tests, and maintainability. Each unique HEAD commit is reviewed exactly once — no duplicates when you push a fix.
exampleImplementation:
Trigger: cron */5 * * * *
Required secret: GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN

1. Poll configured repos for open PRs not yet reviewed at their current HEAD commit.
2. Skip drafts and PRs without the required label (when configured).
3. For each new/updated PR, create an OpenHands conversation that fetches the diff and posts a structured review via the GitHub Reviews API.
4. Post a 'review in progress' comment on the PR with a link to the conversation.
5. Record the reviewed HEAD SHA — the same commit is never reviewed twice.
